defs.name: analyze_clusters
defs.description: Find repeated design patterns (potential components). Groups nodes by structural signature — type, size, and child structure.

defs.name: analyze_colors
defs.description: Analyze color palette usage across the current page. Shows frequency, variable bindings, and optionally clusters similar colors.

defs.name: diff_create
defs.description: Create a structural diff between two node trees. Compares properties (fills, strokes, effects, text, size, position) in unified diff format.

defs.name: diff_show
defs.description: Preview what would change if properties were applied to a node. Shows a unified diff of current vs proposed state.

defs.name: eval
defs.description: Execute JavaScript with full Figma Plugin API access. Use for operations not covered by other tools. The `figma` global is available.

defs.name: analyze_overlaps
defs.description: Detect visual overlaps and layout overflows across the current page. Useful for finding content that covers footers, text that bleeds outside frames, and accidental sibling overlaps.

defs.name: analyze_spacing
defs.description: Analyze spacing values (gap, padding) across the current page. Checks grid compliance.

defs.name: analyze_typography
defs.description: Analyze typography usage across the current page. Shows font families, sizes, weights, and their frequencies.

defs.name: calc
defs.description: Arithmetic calculator. ALWAYS use instead of mental math. Pass one expression or a JSON array of expressions — all evaluated in one call. Supports: + - * / % ** ( ) min max floor ceil round abs sqrt pow. Examples: "844 - 56 - 96 - 82", '["1440 * 8 / 12", "(952 - 16) / 2", "floor(390 * 0.6)"]'

defs.name: design_to_component_map
defs.description: Analyze the document and return a structured component decomposition: components (with variants, props, instance counts), screens, and a dependency overview.

defs.name: design_to_tokens
defs.description: Extract design tokens from Figma variables as CSS custom properties, Tailwind theme config, or JSON. Resolves aliases, handles multiple modes (light/dark).

defs.name: create_shape
defs.description: Create a shape on the canvas. Use FRAME for containers/cards, RECTANGLE for solid blocks, ELLIPSE for circles, TEXT for labels, SECTION for page sections.

defs.name: create_page
defs.description: Create a new page.

defs.name: create_slice
defs.description: Create a slice (export region) on the canvas.

defs.name: create_component
defs.description: Convert a frame/group into a component.

defs.name: create_instance
defs.description: Create an instance of a component.

defs.name: fetch_icons
defs.description: Pre-fetch icons from Iconify into cache. Batches by prefix (one HTTP request per set). Call this once with all needed icons, then use insert_icon to place them instantly. Popular sets: lucide (outline), mdi (filled), heroicons, tabler, solar, mingcute, ri (remix).

defs.name: insert_icon
defs.description: Insert one or more vector icons onto the canvas. Pass a single name or multiple names to batch-insert into the same parent. If already cached by fetch_icons — instant, no network request.

defs.name: search_icons
defs.description: Search Iconify for icons by keyword. Accepts multiple queries — all searched in parallel. Returns results keyed by query.

defs.name: render
defs.description: Render JSX to design nodes. Use replace_id to swap a skeleton placeholder with real content (keeps position in parent). Example: <Frame name="Card" w={320} h="hug" flex="col" gap={16} p={24} bg="#FFF" rounded={16}><Text size={18} weight="bold">Title</Text></Frame>

defs.name: import_svg
defs.description: Import raw SVG markup onto the canvas. Parses <path>, <circle>, <ellipse>, <rect>, <line>, <polygon>, <polyline> elements and creates vector nodes. Supports fill, stroke, stroke-width, viewBox sizing.

defs.name: create_vector
defs.description: Create a vector node with optional path data.

defs.name: describe
defs.description: Semantic description of one or more nodes. Pass `id` for a single node, or `ids` for multiple nodes in one call. Omit depth for auto — adapts to subtree size (small block → deeper, large page → shallower).

defs.name: set_effects
defs.description: Set effects on a node (drop shadow, inner shadow, blur). Pass an array or a single effect.

defs.name: set_rotation
defs.description: Set rotation angle of a node in degrees.

defs.name: set_opacity
defs.description: Set opacity of a node (0-1).

defs.name: set_radius
defs.description: Set corner radius. Use individual corners for independent values.

defs.name: set_minmax
defs.description: Set min/max width and height constraints on a node.

defs.name: set_layout
defs.description: Set auto-layout (flexbox) on a frame. Direction, alignment, spacing, padding.

defs.name: set_constraints
defs.description: Set resize constraints for a node within its parent.

defs.name: set_layout_child
defs.description: Configure auto-layout child: sizing (FIXED/HUG/FILL), grow, alignment, absolute positioning.

defs.name: set_fill
defs.description: Set fill on a node. Solid: color="#ff0000". Linear gradient: gradient="top-bottom" or "left-right" with color (start) and color_end (end).

defs.name: set_stroke
defs.description: Set the stroke (border) of a node.

defs.name: set_image_fill
defs.description: Set an image fill on a node from base64-encoded image data.

defs.name: set_visible
defs.description: Set visibility of a node.

defs.name: set_blend
defs.description: Set blend mode of a node.

defs.name: set_locked
defs.description: Set locked state of a node.

defs.name: set_stroke_align
defs.description: Set stroke alignment of a node.

defs.name: set_text
defs.description: Set text content of a text node.

defs.name: set_font
defs.description: Set font properties of a text node.

defs.name: set_font_range
defs.description: Set font properties for a text range.

defs.name: set_text_resize
defs.description: Set text auto-resize mode.

defs.name: set_text_properties
defs.description: Set text layout properties: alignment, auto-resize, text case, decoration, truncation.

defs.name: update_node
defs.description: Update properties of an existing node: position, size, opacity, corner radius, visibility, text, font.

defs.name: get_components
defs.description: List all components in the document, optionally filtered by name.

defs.name: list_fonts
defs.description: List fonts used in the current page.

defs.name: list_available_fonts
defs.description: List font families the host can render (system fonts on desktop plus any bundled fonts). Use this to discover what fonts are available to set on a text node — distinct from list_fonts which only reports families currently used in the page.

defs.name: get_jsx
defs.description: Get JSX representation of a node and its children. Compact round-trip format — same syntax as the render tool.

defs.name: diff_jsx
defs.description: Structural diff between two nodes in JSX format. Shows added/removed children, changed props.

defs.name: get_page_tree
defs.description: Get the node tree of the current page. Returns lightweight hierarchy: id, type, name, size. Use depth, root_id, or node_types to keep large pages small. Use get_node for full properties of a specific node.

defs.name: get_node
defs.description: Get detailed properties of a node by ID. Use depth to limit child recursion (0 = node only, 1 = direct children, etc). Default: unlimited.

defs.name: find_nodes
defs.description: Find nodes by name pattern and/or type.

defs.name: list_pages
defs.description: List all pages in the document.

defs.name: switch_page
defs.description: Switch to a different page by name or ID.

defs.name: get_current_page
defs.description: Get the current page name and ID.

defs.name: page_bounds
defs.description: Get bounding box of all objects on the current page.

defs.name: query_nodes
get_selection
defs.description: Get details about currently selected nodes.

defs.name: select_nodes
defs.description: Select one or more nodes by ID.

defs.name: stock_photo
defs.description: Search stock photos and apply to nodes. Pass a JSON array — all fetched in parallel. Each item: {id, query, index?, orientation?}. Only works on leaf shapes (Rectangle/Ellipse).

defs.name: arrange
defs.description: Arrange top-level nodes on the canvas in a grid, row, or column layout. Useful after batch creation to tidy up overlapping frames.

defs.name: delete_node
defs.description: Delete a node by ID.

defs.name: clone_node
defs.description: Clone (duplicate) a node.

defs.name: rename_node
defs.description: Rename a node in the layers panel.

defs.name: node_bounds
defs.description: Get absolute bounding box of a node.

defs.name: node_move
defs.description: Move a node to new coordinates.

defs.name: node_resize
defs.description: Resize a node.

defs.name: batch_update
defs.description: Execute multiple modifications in one call. Each operation is {id, props} where props can include: spacing, padding, padding_horizontal, padding_vertical, counter_align, sizing_horizontal, sizing_vertical, grow, name, visible, corner_radius, auto_resize (for text), direction. Runs all updates with one layout recompute.

defs.name: reparent_node
defs.description: Move a node into a different parent.

defs.name: group_nodes
defs.description: Group selected nodes.

defs.name: ungroup_node
defs.description: Ungroup a group node.

defs.name: flatten_nodes
defs.description: Flatten nodes into a single vector.

defs.name: node_to_component
defs.description: Convert one or more frames/groups into components.

defs.name: node_replace_with
defs.description: Replace a node with JSX content.

defs.name: node_ancestors
defs.description: Get the ancestor chain from a node to the page root.

defs.name: node_children
defs.description: Get direct children of a node.

defs.name: node_tree
defs.description: Get a node tree with types and hierarchy.

defs.name: node_bindings
defs.description: Get variable bindings for a node.

defs.name: bind_variable
defs.description: Bind a variable to a node property. For fills/strokes color bindings use indexed format like "fills/0/color".

defs.name: list_collections
defs.description: List all variable collections.

defs.name: get_collection
defs.description: Get a variable collection by ID.

defs.name: create_collection
defs.description: Create a new variable collection.

defs.name: delete_collection
defs.description: Delete a variable collection and all its variables.

defs.name: list_variables
defs.description: List all design variables (colors, numbers, strings, booleans).

defs.name: get_variable
defs.description: Get a variable by ID.

defs.name: find_variables
defs.description: Find variables by name pattern.

defs.name: unbind_variable
defs.description: Remove a variable binding from a node property.

defs.name: create_variable
defs.description: Create a new variable in a collection.

defs.name: set_variable
defs.description: Set the value of a variable for a specific mode.

defs.name: delete_variable
defs.description: Delete a variable.

defs.name: boolean_union
defs.description: Union (combine) multiple nodes.

defs.name: boolean_subtract
defs.description: Subtract the second node from the first.

defs.name: boolean_intersect
defs.description: Intersect multiple nodes.

defs.name: boolean_exclude
defs.description: Exclude (XOR) multiple nodes.

defs.name: export_svg
defs.description: Export nodes as SVG markup. Returns the SVG string.

defs.name: export_pdf
defs.description: Export nodes as a vector PDF document. Text remains selectable, paths stay sharp at any zoom. Returns base64-encoded PDF data.

defs.name: export_image
defs.description: Export nodes as a raster image (PNG, JPG, or WEBP). Returns base64-encoded image data. Use to visually verify designs.

defs.name: path_get
defs.description: Get vector path data of a node.

defs.name: path_set
defs.description: Set vector path data on a node. Provide a VectorNetwork JSON.

defs.name: path_scale
defs.description: Scale vector path from center.

defs.name: path_flip
defs.description: Flip vector path horizontally or vertically.

defs.name: path_move
defs.description: Move all path points by an offset.

defs.name: viewport_get
defs.description: Get current viewport position and zoom level.

defs.name: viewport_set
defs.description: Set viewport position and zoom.

defs.name: viewport_zoom_to_fit
defs.description: Zoom viewport to fit specified nodes.
